## Testing

## Overlay Submission Checklist

Complete this section if this PR adds a community overlay.

- [ ] Added the overlay folder under `community-overlays/`
- [ ] Updated `community-overlays/registry.json`
- [ ] Confirmed `manifest.json` is valid
- [ ] Confirmed overlay `id` matches the folder name
- [ ] Tested the overlay in RL Overlay Hub
- [ ] Tested the overlay using Rocket League
- [ ] Tested the overlay in OBS
